email: norberto.simionato@gmail.com universities: state university of campinas (unicamp), cidade universitaria "zeferino vaz", distrito de baráo geraldo, campinas, sp, brazil ecole de mines de paris, 64, boulevard saint michel, paris,75000, france education degree in electrical /electronic engineering at unicamp (march 2004 to july 2007 and august 2009 to december 2009) > program includes: calculus linear algebra classical and modern physics basic chemistry logical circuits computer architecture generation, transmission and distribution of electrical power power electronics electrical machines digital microelectronics principles of telecommunication materials for electrical and electronics engineering signal analysis and control theory. > graduated with honor: prize awarded by the regional counsel of engineering and the institute of engineering to the best student of the class of 2009. science and executive engineering, major in industrial economics at the ecole nationale supérieure des mines de paris (ensmp), paris, france (august 2007 to july 2009) > program includes: mathematics physics operational research microprocessor programming basic probability economics thermomechanics imaging processing, cryptography social sciences negotiation standard theory cost evaluation and civil and penal french law. additional courses space system engineering at universidad politecnica de madrid, madrid, spain (one-week course in november 2008) mission analysis and project management. principles of nanotechnologies at the warsaw university of technology, warszawa, poland (one-week course in march 2008) quantum physics and its applications in the design of nanodevices. teaching experience > teaching assistant of classical dynamics at the institute of physics, state university of curriculum: norberto simionato neto campinas (unicamp), campinas, sp, brazil (february 2006 to july 2007). volunteer as teaching assistant of physics and mathematics at colegio cognus during high school (february 2000 to november 2002). research experience weblab developer at allagi engineering, campinas, sp, brazil (february to june 2006) part time > kyatera project: the goal of this project was to establish a high capacity optical network in the state of sáo paulo able to congregate academic institutions and companies in an environment for remote collaborative work. my task was to create a software, using labview from national instruments, capable of remotely controlling a given set of instruments in the photonics laboratory of the state university of campinas. afterwards, this software could be expanded to enable researchers from any institution or university connected to kyatera to remotely perform experiences in this laboratory without their presence. work experience consultant analyst at cybertécnica, sao paulo, brazil (june to august 2010) full time support of hp solutions for software quality assurance: hp quality center and hp quicktest to users at vale do rio doce company. internship at the technology center of renault, paris, france (march to july 2009) full time movie 12 project: development of a computer program that acts as communication gateway between matlab/simulink or ibms statemate and eb guide studio (human- machine interface development environment). the objective is to create a test bench for all human-machine interface software developed by renault. trainee in the flavors model office of givaudan, zurich, switzerland (june to september 2008) full time flavor product repository project: development of the training material intended to teach givaudan employees how to use their new global database. > opportunity management project: analysis of givaudan commercial data and proposal of data indicators that would warn the responsible departments when commercial data are lacking or incoherent. awards and prizes second highest grade in the paris institute of technology admission exam. october,2006 third highest grade in the aeronautics engineering application exam of the university of sao paulo (usp), sao paulo, sp, brazil (january 2003). page 2 norberto.simionato@gmail.com curriculum: norberto awarded prize money from the university of sao paulo (usp) for the 17 highest grade in the national exact sciences application exam (january 2002). second highest grade in the state of sao paulo mathematical olympiad, 1999. languages and computer skills > fluent portuguese (mother tongue). > fluent french (engineering studies in france). > fluent english (97.5% on the toefl). basic german
